candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label and populated across preview years.
Alternative revenue label that may apply in other years, but empty in preview.
Overhead expense, not revenue.
Pretax profit, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total Comprehensive Income attributable to Minority Interest
candidates.why: OCI attribution item, not revenue.
Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet equity reserve item, not revenue.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list; later code should take the first non-missing value.

candidates.why: Direct operating/cost line used in recent years and likely part of cost of sales presentation.
Explicit COGS label, populated in earlier years.
Inventory asset line, not an income statement expense.

variables.notes: Included both labels because presentation appears to change by year; one is generally populated when the other is not.

candidates.why: Broad operating overhead bucket above operating income; acceptable when used with SG&A labels.
Explicit SG&A-type row and populated across years; preferred over broader buckets.
Explicit SG&A row but empty in preview; possible alternative historical label.
Overhead component, but an explicit SG&A row exists so components are less preferred.
Could be SG&A-related, but empty in preview and less direct than explicit SG&A row.

candidates.row_label: Gain on sale of assets (operating/administrative expenses)
candidates.why: Gain item, not recurring SG&A overhead.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit populated SG&A row only, per hierarchy. Did not add R&D because the dedicated R&D line appears below operating profit/EBIT section in the statement ordering.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense label; appears as a supplemental/below-EBIT disclosure but is still the best available XRD mapping.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D line exists, but it appears below operating profit/EBIT in the statement ordering, so it is mapped to XRD only and not also added to XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Interest income, opposite sign/concept of interest expense.
Explicit interest expense label, but empty in preview.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses and other financial expenses
candidates.why: Best single recurring finance-cost line available across years; includes interest expense and related recurring finance costs.
Recurring finance cost component, but selecting it with the total line would risk double counting.
Explicit interest expense component in some years, but not available consistently and likely included in the broader finance-cost line.
Reduces/offsets gross borrowing cost rather than representing expense to include directly.
Correct concept but empty in preview; less useful than populated total line.
Profit attribution line, not interest expense.
Minority attribution line, not interest expense.
Capitalized amount, not current-period finance expense to include directly.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Recurring interest subcomponent, but would double count with the broader finance-cost total.
Liability balance, not income statement interest expense.
Liability balance, not income statement interest expense.
Equity item, not interest expense.
Equity item, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses and other financial expenses

variables.notes: Chose the single recurring finance-cost total to avoid double counting versus underlying components such as lease interest and interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Net income/(loss) from equity accounted investments
candidates.why: Income statement investment result, not equity.

candidates.why: Income attribution line, not balance sheet equity.

candidates.row_label: Share of OCI from equity accounted investments
candidates.why: OCI component, not total book equity.

candidates.row_label: Attributable to the equity holders of the company
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution, not balance sheet equity.
Income statement item, not book equity.
Asset line, not equity.

candidates.row_label: Payables to equity accounted companies and other related parties
candidates.why: Liability line, not equity.
Owner/parent equity line and excludes non-controlling interests because NCI is shown separately.
Equity reserve component, not total book equity.
Includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred when separate NCI exists.

variables.notes: Preferred owner equity line because non-controlling interests are reported separately and should be excluded from BE.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Direct balance sheet NCI line; best match for minority interest.
